children.heading: Categorical exclusion
children.label: 1 Categorical exclusion
children.text: The term “categorical exclusion” has the meaning given the term in section 1508.1 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation).

children.heading: Environmental assessment
children.label: 2 Environmental assessment
children.text: The term “environmental assessment” has the meaning given the term in section 1508.1 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation).

children.heading: Environmental impact statement
children.label: 3 Environmental impact statement
children.text: The term “environmental impact statement” means a detailed written statement required under section 102(2)(C) of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ().42 U.S.C. 4332(2)(C)

children.heading: Finding of no significant impact
children.label: 4 Finding of no significant impact
children.text: The term “finding of no significant impact” has the meaning given the term in section 1508.1 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation).

children.heading: Project study
children.label: 5 Project study
children.text: The term “project study” means a feasibility study for a project carried out pursuant to for which a categorical exclusion may apply, or an environmental assessment or an environmental impact statement is required, pursuant to the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.).section 2282 of this title42 U.S.C. 4321

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out a process to track, and annually submit to the Committee on Environment and Public Works of the Senate and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives, a report containing the information described in subparagraph (B).

children.label: i
children.text: the number of project studies for which a categorical exclusion was used during the reporting period;

children.label: ii
children.text: the number of project studies for which the decision to use a categorical exclusion, to prepare an environmental assessment, or to prepare an environmental impact statement is pending on the date on which the report is submitted;

children.label: iii
children.text: the number of project studies for which an environmental assessment was issued during the reporting period, broken down by whether a finding of no significant impact, if applicable, was based on mitigation;

children.label: iv
children.text: the length of time the Corps of Engineers took to complete each environmental assessment described in clause (iii);

children.label: v
children.text: the number of project studies pending on the date on which the report is submitted for which an environmental assessment is being drafted;

children.label: vi
children.text: the number of project studies for which an environmental impact statement was issued during the reporting period;

children.label: vii
children.text: the length of time the Corps of Engineers took to complete each environmental impact statement described in clause (vi); and

children.label: viii
children.text: the number of project studies pending on the date on which the report is submitted for which an environmental impact statement is being drafted.

children.heading: Public access to NEPA reports
children.label: 2 Public access to NEPA reports
children.text: The Secretary shall make each annual report required under paragraph (1) publicly available (including on a publicly available website).
